title: hieracium murorum subsp. triangulariforme
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. triangulariforme, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as promoting wound healing and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium murorum subsp. triangulariforme is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
